rulings.Case Title: DAVID A. BRADLOW VS. NATALIE MARDEUSZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 10, 2016, line 4. DEFENDANT FRANK MARDEUSZ DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT transferred to department 302 to be heard on August 17, 2016 at 9:30 a.m. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.7B and provide courtesy copies of the moving papers, operative complaint, and reply to department 302 by August 11, 2016 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date and department. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FRANK GIORGI VS. ADIL SHAIKH ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Wednesday August 10, 2016, line 5. DEFENDANT ADIL SHAIKH DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer. First Amended Complaint sufficiently alleges a cause of action for unlawful detainer based on "30 Day Notice of Termination" per CCP 1946, 1946.1. Whether such notice is proper in light of the option provision of the Agreement to Extend Lease is an issue of fact. Additionally, First Amended Complaint alleges that the 30 day notice was served on March 24, 2016, by operation of law it expired 30 days thereafter. = (501/REQ)
